title: Long term effect of Aldicarb on C. elegans
author: Priota Islam
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.baiwicfe
materials: Bleach synchronize the worms on a Friday

steps.title: Following Monday, seed 4 maintenance plates...
steps.instruction: Following Monday, seed 4 maintenance plates with OP50 and dry under hood

steps.title: Add 150ul of Aldicarb solution to...
steps.instruction: Add 150ul of Aldicarb solution to the 4-maintenance plate to reach a final concentration of 3uM and leave to absorb overnight

steps.title: The following day (Tuesday), refeed the...
steps.instruction: The following day (Tuesday), refeed the arrested L1s on the treatment plates and normal OP50 seeded plates i.e. OW1601 L1s refed on 2x3uM aldicarb plate + 2xnormal OP50 seeded plate. Same for OW1603. So, each strain will have two control plates and two treatment plates- Total 8 plates

steps.title: Keep one set of plates at...
steps.instruction: Keep one set of plates at 25C and the other set at 20C

steps.title: The day before tracking (Thursday) add...
steps.instruction: The day before tracking (Thursday) add 35ul of 300uM AK to 24 imaging plates

steps.title: Also, seed those drugs treated 24...
steps.instruction: Also, seed those drugs treated 24 imaging plates and additional 24 non-treated imaging plates with 50ul of 1:10 OP50 and leave to dry O/N

steps.title: On the day of tracking (Friday),...
steps.instruction: On the day of tracking (Friday), transfer 5 worms onto each imaging plate and image for 15mins on Phenix Track 8 sets: (2 treatment sets + 2 control sets with no treatment) x 2 growth temperatures
